    mad r2.z, r2.z, r6.y, l(1.000000)
    mul r2.z, r2.z, r2.z

    rcp r2.z, r2.z
    mul r2.z, r2.z, r6.w
    add r6.y, r0.y, l(1.000000)
    mul r6.y, r6.y, r6.y
    mul r6.w, r6.y, l(0.125000)
    mad r6.y, -r6.y, l(0.125000), l(1.000000)
    mad r8.w, r3.w, r6.y, r6.w
    rcp r8.w, r8.w
    mul r8.w, r3.w, r8.w
    mad r6.y, |r1.w|, r6.y, r6.w
    rcp r6.y, r6.y
    mul r6.y, |r1.w|, r6.y

    rcp r8.w, r8.w

    rcp r4.w, r4.w
    mul r4.w, |r1.w|, r4.w
    mul r4.w, r4.w, r8.w

    max r6.w, r6.w, l(0.850000)
    mul r2.z, r2.z, r4.w
    mad r4.w, r5.w, r6.y, -r2.z
    mad r2.z, r6.w, r4.w, r2.z
    mul r12.xzw, r2.zzzz, r13.xxyz
    mul r1.w, r3.w, |r1.w|

    rcp r1.w, r1.w
    mul r11.xyz, r1.wwww, r12.xzwx
  else

// Approximately 485 instruction slots used
